documents.title: Passport (New Application — Adult)
documents.description: Indian Passport for adults (18+), valid 10 years. Issued by Ministry of External Affairs via Passport Seva Kendras.

required_documents.category: Proof of Date of Birth (any one)
options: Birth Certificate issued by Municipal Authority / Gram Panchayat
Policy Bond issued by Public Life Insurance Corporations/Companies
Bank Account Passbook (not older than 3 months)
Letter from recognized public authority verifying residence
Original certificate from employer of reputed companies on letterhead
Spouse's Passport copy (first and last page including family details)

process_steps.title: Register on Passport Seva Portal
process_steps.detail: Go to passportindia.gov.in → 'New User Registration' → Create account with email → Verify email → Log in.
process_steps.tip: Use a personal email you access regularly — all communication comes here.

process_steps.title: Fill Application Form Online
process_steps.detail: Log in → 'Apply for Fresh Passport/Re-issue of Passport' → Select 'Normal' or 'Tatkal' → Fill all details carefully including old passport details if any → Save draft regularly.
process_steps.tip: Have your Aadhaar, PAN, and address documents handy before starting — session times out.

process_steps.title: Pay Fees
process_steps.detail: Normal (36 pages): ₹1,500 | Normal (60 pages): ₹2,000 | Tatkal (36 pages): ₹3,500 | Tatkal (60 pages): ₹4,000. Pay via net banking, debit/credit card, or UPI.

process_steps.title: Book Passport Seva Kendra (PSK) / Post Office PSK Appointment
process_steps.detail: After payment, book the earliest available slot at your nearest PSK or POPSK. You can reschedule once for free.
process_steps.tip: POPSK (Post Office Passport Seva Kendra) appointments are often easier to get in smaller cities.

process_steps.title: Visit PSK with documents
process_steps.detail: Carry original documents + ONE self-attested photocopy of each. Bring printed application form and appointment confirmation. Arrive 15 minutes early.
process_steps.tip: Wear comfortable clothing — queues can take 1–2 hours even with appointment.

process_steps.title: Document verification, biometrics, photo at PSK
process_steps.detail: Three counters: A (document check), B (data verification + photo + biometrics), C (final review + granting). Staff will tell you whether application is Granted, Pending, or Requires Police Verification.
process_steps.tip: If police verification is required, a police officer will visit your address — ensure someone is home.

process_steps.title: Police Verification (if required)
process_steps.detail: SB (Special Branch) police officer will visit your address or call. Keep originals of address proof ready. Provide any additional documents requested.
process_steps.tip: Cooperate fully — delays in police verification are the #1 reason for passport delays.

process_steps.title: Track and receive Passport
process_steps.detail: Track at passportindia.gov.in using File Number from appointment receipt. Passport dispatched via Speed Post. Normal: 30–45 days. Tatkal: 7–14 days (post-PV).
process_steps.tip: Track Speed Post separately on indiapost.gov.in using the dispatch tracking number in your portal.

documents.title: Passport Renewal / Re-issue
documents.description: Re-issue of expired or expiring Indian Passport, or due to change of name/address/appearance.

options: Self-attested copy of first two and last two pages of old passport
Self-attested copy of ECR/ECNR page if applicable
Bank Account Passbook (not older than 3 months)

required_documents.category: If applying due to name change after marriage
options: Marriage Certificate issued by Registrar of Marriages
Spouse's Passport (copy of first and last page)
Joint Affidavit by husband and wife on ₹10 non-judicial stamp paper

process_steps.title: Apply online same as fresh passport
process_steps.detail: On passportindia.gov.in, select 'Re-issue of Passport' and choose the reason (expiry, damaged, change of personal details, lost/stolen, etc.).
process_steps.tip: If passport is lost/stolen, you must file a police complaint (FIR) first and bring that copy.

process_steps.title: Surrender old passport at PSK
process_steps.detail: Old passport is collected by PSK staff and cancelled with holes punched — you get it back after new passport is issued. Keep all pages intact.
process_steps.tip: Do not remove visa pages or any pages before submitting.

process_steps.title: Rest of process same as fresh application
process_steps.detail: Biometrics, photo, verification at PSK, then dispatch. Renewals where information hasn't changed are often Pre-Police Verification (faster).
